argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 3; const pageSize = Math.min(Math.max(limit, 3), 10); const apiPath = '/api/galaxy/creator/datacenter/note/analyze/list'; const timeout = 8; const DISGUISE_FN = ` function __disguise(fn, name) { const nativeStr = 'function ' + name + '() { [native code] }'; const _origToString = Function.prototype.toString; const _patchedFns = window.__dFns || (function() { const m = new Map(); Object.defineProperty(window, '__dFns', { value: m, enumerable: false, configurable: true }); Object.defineProperty(Function.prototype, 'toString', { value: function() { const override = m.get(this); return override !== undefined ? override : _origToString.call(this); }, writable: true, configurable: true }); return m; })(); _patchedFns.set(fn, nativeStr); try { Object.defineProperty(fn, 'name', { value: name, configurable: true }); } catch {} return fn; }`; let captured = null; let captureResolve; const capturePromise = new Promise(r => { captureResolve = r; }); eval(DISGUISE_FN); const origFetch = window.fetch; window.fetch = __disguise(async function(...fetchArgs) { const resp = await origFetch.apply(this, fetchArgs); try { const url = typeof fetchArgs[0] === 'string' ? fetchArgs[0] : fetchArgs[0] instanceof Request ? fetchArgs[0].url : String(fetchArgs[0]); if (url.includes(apiPath) && !captured) { try { captured = await resp.clone().json(); captureResolve(); } catch {} } } catch {} return resp; }, 'fetch'); const origXhrOpen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open; const origXhrSend = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = __disguise(function(method, url) { Object.defineProperty(this, '__iurl', { value: String(url), writable: true, enumerable: false, configurable: true }); return origXhrOpen.apply(this, arguments); }, 'open'); XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = __disguise(function(body) { if (this.__iurl?.includes(apiPath) && !captured) { this.addEventListener('load', function() { if (!captured) { try { captured = JSON.parse(this.responseText); captureResolve(); } catch {} } }); } return origXhrSend.apply(this, arguments); }, 'send'); try { const app = document.querySelector('#app'); let store = null; let actionFound = false; try { const pinia = app?.__vue_app__?.config?.globalProperties?.$pinia; if (pinia?._s) { for (const [name, s] of pinia._s) { if (s && typeof s === 'object') { for (const key of Object.keys(s)) { if (typeof s[key] === 'function' && (key.includes('fetch') || key.includes('load') || key.includes('get') || key.includes('query'))) { store = s; actionFound = true; break; } } } if (actionFound) break; } } } catch {} if (!store) { try { const vuexStore = app?.__vue_app__?.config?.globalProperties?.$store ?? app?.__vue__?.$store; if (vuexStore && vuexStore._actions) { for (const [type, handlers] of Object.entries(vuexStore._actions)) { if (type.includes('note') || type.includes('analyze') || type.includes('fetch')) { store = { dispatch: vuexStore.dispatch.bind(vuexStore) }; break; } } } } catch {} } if (store && actionFound) { for (const key of Object.keys(store)) { if (typeof store[key] === 'function' && (key.includes('fetch') || key.includes('load') || key.includes('get'))) { try { await store[key]({ page_size: pageSize, page_num: 1, type: 0 }); } catch {} break; } } } if (!captured) { const newUrl = new URL(location.href); newUrl.searchParams.set('page_size', pageSize); newUrl.searchParams.set('page_num', '1'); history.pushState({}, '', newUrl.toString()); window.dispatchEvent(new PopStateEvent('popstate')); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } if (!captured) { await Promise.race([capturePromise, new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, timeout * 1000))]); } } finally { window.fetch = origFetch; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = origXhrOpen; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = origXhrSend; } if (!captured) return { error: 'No response captured', needTap: true, apiPath }; return { captured, limit, pageSize }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return intermediate; const limit = intermediate.limit || 3; const formatPostTime = (ts) => { if (!ts) return ''; const CST_OFFSET_MS = 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000; const date = new Date(ts + CST_OFFSET_MS); const pad = (v) => String(v).padStart(2, '0'); return date.getUTCFullYear() + '-' + pad(date.getUTCMonth() + 1) + '-' + pad(date.getUTCDate()) + ' ' + pad(date.getUTCHours()) + ':' + pad(date.getUTCMinutes()); }; const buildNoteDetailUrl = (noteId) => noteId ? 'https://creator.xiaohongshu.com/statistics/note-detail?noteId=' + encodeURIComponent(noteId) : ''; const data = intermediate.captured; const items = data?.data?.note_infos ?? []; if (!items.length) return { error: 'No notes found', needTap: true }; const summaries = []; for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(items.length, limit); i++) { const note = items[i]; const noteId = note.id ?? ''; summaries.push({ rank: i + 1, id: noteId, title: note.title ?? '', published_at: formatPostTime(note.post_time), views: String(note.read_count ?? 0), likes: String(note.like_count ?? 0), collects: String(note.fav_count ?? 0), comments: String(note.comment_count ?? 0), shares: '0', avg_view_time: '', rise_fans: '0', top_source: '', top_source_pct: '', top_interest: '', top_interest_pct: '', url: buildNoteDetailUrl(noteId) }); } return summaries; }

description: 小红书最近笔记批量摘要 (列表 + 单篇关键数据汇总)
name: CreatorNotesSummary

variables.name: limit
variables.help: Number of recent notes to summarize
